2604.19254.title: ShadowPEFT: Shadow Network for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
2604.19254.paper_summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) reduces the training cost of full-parameter fine-tuning for large language models (LLMs) by training only a small set of task-specific parameters while freezing the pretrained backbone. However, existing approaches, such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), achieve adaptation by inserting independent low-rank perturbations directly to individual weights, resulting in a local parameterization of adaptation. We propose ShadowPEFT, a centralized PEFT framework that instead performs layer-level refinement through a depth-shared shadow module. At each transformer layer, ShadowPEFT maintains a parallel shadow state and evolves it repeatedly for progressively richer hidden states. This design shifts adaptation from distributed weight-space perturbations to a shared layer-space refinement process. Since the shadow module is decoupled from the backbone, it can be reused across depth, independently pretrained, and optionally deployed in a detached mode, benefiting edge computing scenarios. Experiments on generation and understanding benchmarks show that ShadowPEFT matches or outperforms LoRA and DoRA under comparable trainable-parameter budgets. Additional analyses on shadow pretraining, cross-dataset transfer, parameter scaling, inference latency, and system-level evaluation suggest that centralized layer-space adaptation is a competitive and flexible alternative to conventional low-rank PEFT.
2604.19254.paper_summary_zh: 參數有效的微調 (PEFT) 通過僅訓練一小組特定任務的參數，同時凍結預訓練的主幹，降低了大型語言模型 (LLMs) 完整參數微調的訓練成本。 然而，現有的方法，如低秩適應 (LoRA)，通過直接將獨立的低秩擾動插入到各個權重中來實現適應，導致了適應的局部參數化。我們提出了 ShadowPEFT，一個集中式的 PEFT 框架，它通過深度共享的影子模塊執行層級的精煉。在每個Transformer層中，ShadowPEFT 維持一個平行的影子狀態，並不斷演變以獲得更豐富的隱藏狀態。這一設計將適應從分佈式權重空間擾動轉移到共享的層空間精煉過程。由於影子模塊與主幹解耦，它可以在深度上重複使用，獨立預訓練，並可選擇以分離模式部署，這對邊緣計算場景有利。在生成和理解基準上的實驗顯示，ShadowPEFT 在可比較的可訓練參數預算下與 LoRA 和 DoRA 相匹配或超越。對影子預訓練、跨數據集轉移、參數縮放、推理延遲和系統級評估的額外分析表明，集中式層空間適應是傳統低秩 PEFT 的一個具有競爭力和靈活性的替代方案。
2604.19254.author: Xianming Li et.al.
2604.19254.authors: Xianming Li, Zongxi Li, Tsz-fung Andrew Lee, Jing Li, Haoran Xie, Qing Li
